hero.name: Thiago Ibrahim
hero.tagline: Building modern solutions with programming and Artificial Intelligence.

about.description: I'm a Brazilian student passionate about technology and software development. Currently focused on Backend Development, Software Architecture, and Artificial Intelligence, I consistently seek to learn and grow through practical projects and real-world applications.
about.goal: Become a Software Engineer capable of building complete products using software engineering and AI.

highlights.title: Dedicated Student
highlights.description: Learning Java and Python to build a solid foundation in programming.

highlights.title: Backend Focused
highlights.description: Interested in software architecture, scalable systems, and development best practices.

highlights.title: AI Enthusiast
highlights.description: Exploring how Artificial Intelligence can solve real problems and create innovative solutions.

goal.title: Goal
goal.description: Create useful, scalable, and modern software solutions.

items.name: AI Interview Platform
items.description: Intelligent platform to practice technical interviews with automated AI feedback.
items.architecture: Backend API with Python processing AI models for interview analysis and feedback generation.
items.challenge: Implementing real-time AI analysis while maintaining low latency for a smooth interview experience.
items.lessons: Deepened understanding of API design, AI integration patterns, and asynchronous processing.
